description: High-level unattended training campaign for moving the representative vendor fixture from current generated sequence quality toward human-level full-sequence creation.

expectedRuntime.operatorExpectation: Run until the campaign objective, daily time budget, disk budget, or an intervention-required guardrail is reached. This is not a per-loop or per-job-slice approval boundary.

objective.primaryOutcome: Generate complete, musically coherent, visually readable, color-rich whole-display sequences on the representative vendor fixture.
promotionPhilosophy: Optimize whole-display quality over isolated effect quality.
Learn ranges of valid sequencing behavior, not one fixed recipe.
Treat effect-level and model-level learning as supporting evidence for full-sequence decisions.
Use human review only when automated evidence is ambiguous, scorer alignment is weak, or new rubric labels are explicitly needed.

campaignPhases.purpose: Prove unattended execution, checkpoints, cleanup, and compact evidence retention.
exitCriteria: unattended loops can stop without per-loop approval
preview frames are deleted after summarization
job-run retention keeps output bounded

campaignPhases.purpose: Expand valid timing and accent ranges over the current guarded foundation without collapsing into one best-scoring look.
exitCriteria: multiple timing families have repeated stable or improving full-sequence evidence
color-purpose and focal-handoff guardrails remain stable
known bad branches are recorded as avoidances rather than retried blindly

campaignPhases.purpose: Improve whole-display focal handoff, visual hierarchy, section-to-section readability, and context preservation across complete generated sequences.
exitCriteria: focal-handoff/context variants are tested as compact multi-window sequences
successful variants repeat without whole-sequence regressions
failed variants identify clear avoidances or require human review

campaignPhases.purpose: Use synthesized timing tracks and later real audio analysis to connect generated sequencing to beats, sections, lyrics, releases, and energy arcs.
exitCriteria: synthetic timing-track sequences create readable structure and release moments
style variation remains broad enough to avoid predictable repeated looks
real audio analysis gaps are isolated from sequencing-quality learning

campaignPhases.purpose: Expand synthetic timing-overlay style ranges across motion, palette role, sparse accent density, early/delayed/syncopated phrase placement, and release-hold timing while preserving the whole-display foundation.
exitCriteria: remaining baseline-preserving timing overlay families have repeated stable or improving evidence
sparse and syncopated timing variants do not collapse whole-display readability
failed timing variants identify avoidances or request human review rather than being retried blindly

campaignPhases.purpose: Repair synthetic timing branches that improved local clarity but regressed color discipline, quality consistency, temporal continuity, or full-sequence context.
exitCriteria: guarded audio repair is tested without rebuilding the broad audio-alignment stack
sparse palette discipline repair avoids the reserved secondary-palette regression
failed repairs identify avoidances or request human review rather than being retried blindly

campaignPhases.purpose: Use production-sequence review labels and targeted generated-sequence review prompts to calibrate automated quality scoring.
exitCriteria: automated dimensions are classified as optimization targets, guardrails, or diagnostics
new generated candidates can be reviewed quickly in the app when scorer confidence is weak
promotion uses human-calibrated gates for full-sequence quality

campaignPhases.purpose: Validate how shared vendor-fixture learnings transfer to a specific user display and where project-local target/submodel behavior evidence is required.
exitCriteria: shared priors are applied only to structurally and semantically compatible targets
unknown/custom/edge targets gather project-local evidence before confident reuse
sequence-level generation can blend shared baseline knowledge with project-local metadata

unattendedPolicy.jobSliceRole: A training job spec is a bounded slice inside this campaign, not the campaign itself.
continueWithoutUserApprovalWhen: a job slice completes normally and the next planned slice is clear
a bounded controller or curriculum repair is needed to continue the campaign
intermediate generated artifacts can be safely summarized and deleted
focused tests pass after a scoped automation change
stopForUserWhen: human visual judgment is needed in the Review page
the scoring philosophy or product objective needs to change
the selected show folder/project linkage would change
source training assets or user-authored metadata would be deleted
